race.comment: GRANDINI (3) tough country-trained mare racing in a rich vein of form. Looked to have plenty up the sleeve when saluting over this track and trip two-back. Snagged back early from the wide draw and launched late with a close third over 2100m at Tamworth. Can race a touch closer from the good gate and sure to go close. SARAPO (6) frustrating gelding who steps up in trip and grade deep into the prep. Has been crunched in early betting after running on late to secure third over 1900m at Canterbury. Quickly running out of chances. RING AHOY (10) has his hoof on the till after catching the eye at his last two outings. Comes out of a strong race after finishing fourth over 2100m at Tamworth behind Warrior For Peace. Look for late with the key jockey change. MORTLAKE (5) dropped in trip with a battling seventh in stronger company when a disappointing seventh over 1800m at Port Macquarie in BM66 grade. Out to his right trip now and goes into the exotics.
